response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments. His background in agentic workflows and event-driven systems is relevant, though not at the scale or risk profile required for this role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Proven track record in event-driven and distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Diverse technical leadership in scaling engineering practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, observability).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) in high-growth scale-ups.
Limited fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, real-time risk modeling).
Agentic AI experience appears more prototypical (e.g., tooling, frameworks) than production-grade for high-stakes environments.
